name: First Baptist Church Sapulpa
description: Come play pickleball at First Baptist Church Sapulpa in Sapulpa, OK! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.
hours: Friday 6pm at FBC Sapulpa Special service where we reflect on the magnitude of Jesus laying down his life for us. 4/05 - Easter Sunday First Service 9:00am

name: Liberty Park
description: Liberty Park is a place to play pickleball in Sapulpa, OK. There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is free. The facility includes amenities like lights.
